channel.title: Lifestyle on cringe.live
channel.description: Recent content in Lifestyle on cringe.live

item.title: Green Tea
item.description: Embracing comfort has been the highlight of my midlife crisis! I switched from slurping coffee to sipping green tea, and let me tell you, it has been an amazing experience. While I know people usually discard their first infusions because of its strength, I just dose it out for a 5 minute hot water bath. But I also tried out crushing up the leaves with mortar and pestle and gulping down the resulting “snuff”.
